channel.title: Software on Cha Fernandez
channel.description: Recent content in Software on Cha Fernandez

item.title: ChickenCoop - Mobile App
item.description: Chicken App is a Hardware - Paired Mobile Application for Chicken Coop Temperature Checking.

item.title: MultiTask - Mobile App
item.description: A combination of Task Manager, Expenses Tracker, and Habit Tracker app.

item.title: Table Tennis Score Board - Mobile App
item.description: The TTSB (Table Tennis Score Board) app was initially developed for classroom use during our Physical Education Subject.
